title: Manifest
description: Index metadata for discovering available dated challenges.

contentVersion.description: Content revision identifier. Must use 1 to 4 dot-separated numeric components, each from 0 to 10,000 without leading zeroes, with an optional single lowercase suffix letter and optional trailing integer from 0 to 10,000. Typically, this should be the creation date written as YYYY.M.D in reverse calendar order, for example 2026.3.23. The optional fourth number can represent revisions within the published day and the number after the optional lowercase letter can represent minor revisions.

generatedAt.description: Manifest generation timestamp. Values are normalized to the nearest whole second.

availableFrom.description: Earliest available challenge date. Supported content dates must be between 2026-01-01 and 2126-01-01, inclusive.

availableTo.description: Latest available challenge date. Supported content dates must be between 2026-01-01 and 2126-01-01, inclusive.

days.description: Metadata for each daily challenge. Entries must be ordered by ascending date, contain exactly one entry per calendar day, and must not skip days.

date.description: Puzzle date. Supported content dates must be between 2026-01-01 and 2126-01-01, inclusive. Within the parent manifest, each date must appear exactly once and participate in a contiguous day-by-day sequence.

difficulty.description: Difficulty value from the challenge, from 1 to 10.

category.description: Puzzle category. Must not be empty or whitespace-only.

path.description: Path to the challenge JSON file. Must not be empty or whitespace-only.

hash.description: Integrity hash for caching. Must not be empty or whitespace-only.
